title: No Hide Flags
description: A simple mod to show hidden NBT on every item.
body:
This is a simple mod to show the hidden NBTs on every item.

Hidden NBTs, also known as HideFlags, are usually set by server admins when `/give`ing items to players. In these cases, special enchantments and effects are hidden in order to keep the item description cleaner and easier to read. This is confusing for advanced players.

I'm not responsible for you being banned/restricted in any server whose admins don't like this mod. Use with caution.
